title: MaiPSummon — Persona Generator
promptResetConfirm: Reset prompt to default? Current changes will be lost.
noteEnJa: English and Japanese prompt templates are machine-translated. Manual verification recommended.
configNote: The following config blocks can be copied directly into your maimaibot bot_config.toml.
inputDesc: Select a configured model and paste any text, character card, or personality description to parse it into MAIBOT config format.
sourceTextPlaceholder: Paste a character card, personality notes, speaking style description, or group chat requirements. The model will split it into personality / reply_style / chat prompt.
extraRequirementsPlaceholder: e.g. Shorter and more casual; no aggression; maintain teaching assistant tone; don't write in character card style.
resultDesc: Results are split into config blocks. Injecting only overwrites the corresponding field without affecting other settings.
waitingDesc: Select a model and enter a persona description. Results will be split into config blocks based on bot_config.toml fields.
